Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class EACSettings

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.EACSettings
public class EACSettings extends Metadata

Java class for EACSettings complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="EACSettings">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}Metadata">
       <sequence>
         <element name="addRcCompToFlexiPages" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="autoPopulateGoogleMeetLinks" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="automatedEmailFilter" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableActivityAnalyticsPref" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableActivityCapture" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableActivityMetrics" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableActivitySyncEngine" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableEACForEveryonePref" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableEnforceEacSharingPref" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableInboxActivitySharing" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableInsightsInTimeline" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableInsightsInTimelineEacStd" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="provisionProductivityFeatures" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="salesforceEventsOnlyPref" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="sensitiveEmailFilter" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="syncInternalEvents" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
